widgetTypes.name: Cat® ECS 200 Spec Navigator & Modbus Reference

Events, annunciator, module status

03 / 16

125 regs

Byte Order
Big-Endian
MSW at lower address
1 s

AC power, V, I, Hz, breaker, state

Engine & Protection
Oil psi, coolant °F, battery, alarms

DBA, sync, load share, LSLD

Slow-Changing Data
Energy, hours, I/O, network, clock

🔢 Common Scaling Reference

MeasurementScaleOffsetFormula
Voltage (V)1 V/bit0raw × 1
Current (A)1 A/bit0raw × 1
Frequency (Hz)1/128 Hz/bit0raw ÷ 128
Power Factor1/16384 /bit−2(raw ÷ 16384) − 2
Real Power (W)1 W/bit (32-bit)−2 000 000 000((MSW≪16)|LSW) − 2B
Oil Pressure (psi)1/128 psi/bit0raw ÷ 128
Temperature (°F)1/32 °F/bit−273(raw ÷ 32) − 273
Engine Speed (rpm)0.125 rpm/bit0raw × 0.125
Fuel Level (%)1/2.56 %/bit0raw ÷ 2.56
Fuel Rate (L/hr)0.05 L/hr/bit0raw × 0.05
Engine Hours0.05 hr/bit (32-bit)0((MSW≪16)|LSW) × 0.05
Energy (Wh)1 Wh/bit (32-bit)0((MSW≪16)|LSW) × 1

🔵 Port 502 — 200P — Fast (1 s)

BlockFC03 CallWordsKey Registers
P1Read(2, 4)42 Event Lamp · 3 Horn · 4 Hard SD · 5 Soft SD
P2Read(40, 1)140 Battery Voltage
P3Read(101, 10)10101–110 User Alarm Groups A–J (160 alarm bits)
P4Read(150, 10)10150 Avg V · 152 Avg I · 155–156 kW (2w) · 157 Hz · 159 PF
P5Read(180, 12)12180–182 V LL · 183–185 V LN · 186–188 I · 189–191 PF per phase
P6Read(202, 5)5202–203 kVA (2w) · 205–206 kVAR (2w)
P7Read(228, 5)5228 Avail · 229 Bkr · 230 Mode · 231 Start · 232 Run
P8Read(730, 9)9730 DBA State · 731 DBA Fail · 738 Sync Mode
P9Read(750, 31)31+750–754 Online/Avail · 756–758 Sys kW/% · 759–780 Gen #1 block
✅ 9 transactions · ~77 words (1 unit) — fits in 1-second cycle

🟢 Port 502 — 200P — Slow (5–30 s)

BlockFC03 CallWordsKey Registers
P10Read(208, 13)13208–213 Energy kWh/kVARh (3×2w) · 214–220 Ratings V/I/Hz/kW/PF
P11Read(245, 3)3245 Date · 246 Year · 247 Time
P12Read(350, 1)1350 Data Link Status
P13Read(577, 6)6577–582 Ethernet Port Status (2-wire + 4-wire)
P14Read(700, 16)16700–701 DI · 702 DO · 703–715 AI/AO/PWM
P15Read(1465, 5)51465 LSLD Priority · 1466 LSLD State · 1467–1469 Timers
P16Read(1737, 1)11737 Base Load Setpoint
P17Read(1805, 1)11805 Load Control State
✅ 8 transactions · 46 words — poll every 5–30 seconds

🟠 Port 502 — 200G (Genset/Engine)

BlockFC03 CallWordsKey Registers
G1Read(41, 9)941 Oil psi · 42 Coolant °F · 43 Fuel% · 44 Coolant Lvl · 49 Turbo
G2Read(57, 10)1057–58 Exhaust L/R · 59 Oil °F · 62 Fuel Rate · 65–66 Hours (2w)
G3Read(154, 1)1154 Engine RPM
✅ 3 transactions · 20 words — poll every 1 second

🔴 Port 50201 — Status & Annunciator

BlockFC03 CallWordsKey Registers
S1Read(1, 2)21 Controller Online · 2 ECM Online
S2Read(16, 1)116 Active Event Count
S3Read(611, 23)23611 E-Stop · 613 Overcrank · 614 Overspeed · 617–618 Coolant Hi · 625–626 Oil Lo · etc.
✅ 3 transactions · 26 words — poll every 1–2 seconds
📦
Batch Reads

Read contiguous register blocks in a single FC03 transaction (up to 125 registers). The block plan tab defines all optimized read groups.

⏱
Data Prioritization

Poll critical registers (power, breaker, alarms) every 1 s. Slow-changing data (energy, hours, I/O) every 5–30 s. Use User Alarm Groups (regs 101–110) for event-driven alerting.

🔗
Persistent Connections

Keep TCP connections open. Do not create a new socket per transaction. ThingsBoard Modbus connector handles this automatically.

🔄
Retry with Limits

Implement retries for failed reads. Limit to 2–3 attempts with 1000–3000 ms timeouts. Mark stale data if all retries fail.

📐
Two-Word (32-bit) Registers

Power and energy registers are 32-bit (2 words). MSW is at the lower address. Combine as: value = (MSW << 16) | LSW, then apply scaling and offset.

🔧
ThingsBoard Modbus Connector Config

In tb-gateway Modbus connector, use "type": "holding", "functionCode": 3. For 32-bit: set "objectsCount": 2 and "byteOrder": "BIG". Map each register to a telemetry key matching the block plan above.

🏷
Suggested Telemetry Key Names

Use consistent keys for dashboard binding: gen_avg_voltage, gen_avg_current, gen_frequency, gen_real_power_kw, gen_pf, engine_speed_rpm, oil_pressure_psi, coolant_temp_f, fuel_level_pct, breaker_status, operating_mode, engine_hours.

⚠️
Write Operations (Port 50200)

Use FC16 (Write Multiple Registers) on port 50200. NEVER enable write access without proper authentication and operator-level permissions. Write commands include alarm acknowledge, mode control, start/stop, and setpoint adjustments.
